modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: New students not receiving students@usd.edu email access.

full_description_text:  
The field technician is asking about when new students get added to the students@usd.edu email list. They are concerned because some students are not receiving their emails. It is important for students to have access to this email for their communication needs. The technician wants to ensure everything is working properly for the new students.
